entry.title: Runway and Lionsgate Expand Partnership
entry.summary: Companies Will Launch a Joint Development Program to Create New IP; Lionsgate Has Taken an Equity Interest in Runway

entry.title: Runway Opens London HQ, Bringing World Model Research Hub to the UK and Europe
entry.summary: Announcing London as Runway's new European headquarters and world model research hub, with a planned $100M investment in the UK AI ecosystem and a new Head of Europe.

entry.title: Introducing the Cosmos Coalition
entry.summary: Runway is a founding member of the Cosmos Coalition, a new global initiative with NVIDIA and leading AI labs to build and open-source frontier world models for physical AI.

entry.title: Introducing Runway MCP
entry.summary: You can now generate images and videos in any MCP-compatible agent without ever leaving your workflow.

entry.title: Project Luxo: Crossing the Uncanny Valley of AI Media
entry.summary: Today we're sharing early evidence of a shift we believe will reshape how media is made: AI-generated video is beginning to cross the uncanny valley.

entry.title: Introducing Aleph 2.0 and Edit Studio
entry.summary: Aleph 2.0 is an upgrade to Runway's flagship video editing model, launching alongside Edit Studioâa new product experience designed to close the gap between the video you have and the video you actually need.

entry.title: Why Distributed Training Is Hard: DTensor, Correctness and the Costs of Abstraction
Runway is Coming to Japan
entry.summary: Announcing our expansion into Japan with a Tokyo office, an initial $40M investment, and a new Head of Japan.

entry.title: Introducing Runway Agent
Stop Writing YAML: Configuring ML Systems with confingy
Our Approach to Child Safety
60x Faster Cold Starts: Treating Peer GPUs as Weight Servers
Building Real-Time Video Agent from a Single Image with Runway Characters
entry.summary: How we built a real-time video agent from any single image â photorealistic human, cartoon mascot or fantasy creature â into a fully expressive conversational character at 24fps, with fast end-to-end latency. Zero fine-tuning required.

entry.title: No Idle GPUs: Managing Research Compute at Runway
Runway Expands Collaboration with NYU Tisch School of the Arts
Introducing Runway Builders
Introducing Runway Fund
Building Interactive AI Characters Responsibly
Introducing Runway Labs
Introducing Runway Characters
entry.summary: A real-time video agent API that lets you build fully custom conversational characters, powered by GWM-1.

entry.title: New Leaders to Support Our Next Phase of Growth
New Funding to Scale World Simulation
Runway Advances Video Generation and World Models With NVIDIA Rubin Platform
entry.summary: Accelerating our video and world models research with NVIDIA's Rubin architecture

NYU Tisch Graduate Program brings Runway tools to the Martin Scorsese Virtual Production Center
Runway launches Student Ambassador Program
entry.summary: Today we are excited to announce the launch of our Student Ambassador Program to support students as they prepare to embark on their professional careers.

entry.title: Runway launches fund to provide artists resources to make one hundred films
entry.summary: We believe that the best stories are yet to be told, but that traditional funding mechanisms often overlook new and emerging visions within the larger industry ecosystem. With that in mind, we are excited to announce the introduction of The Hundred Film Fund. A new effort from Runway and Runway Stud

entry.title: Runway Partners with Lionsgate
entry.summary: Runway and Lionsgate are partnering to explore the use of AI in film production.

entry.title: Introducing the Runway API for Gen-3 Alpha Turbo
entry.summary: Developers can now easily integrate our Gen-3 Alpha Turbo model into their apps and products.

entry.title: Exploring the Future of Filmmaking: Runwayâs programming partnership with Tribeca Festival 2024
entry.summary: The film industry stands on the brink of a new era, one where the lines between technology and creativity are blurring and giving way to entirely new forms of storytelling. To explore this foundational shift, Runwayâs AI Film Festival has announced a programming partnership with the 23rd annual Tr

entry.title: Partnering with Musixmatch to enhance the experience of music worldwide
entry.summary: Musixmatch and Runway are partnering to extend the reach of AI-powered media generation by putting generative video directly into the hands of Musixmatchâs community of artists and musicians.

entry.title: Partnering with Media.Monks to expand creative horizons
entry.summary: Media.Monks and Runway are entering into a collaborative partnership that provides the global creative teams and clients of Media.Monks with advanced access to new creative tools and artificial intelligence (AI) models.

entry.title: Runway partners with Getty Images to build enterprise ready AI tools
entry.summary: Runway is partnering with Getty Images to launch a new video model for enterprise customers, addressing companiesâ ever-growing need for high-quality, customized content.

entry.title: Introducing the Runway Acceleration Program
entry.summary: We are excited to introduce the Runway Acceleration Program to help exceptional software engineers become ML practitioners.

entry.title: Runway partners with Canva
entry.summary: Today, we are thrilled to announce that we are partnering with Canva to bring the power of Runway and AI video generation to Canva users all around the world.

entry.title: Runway raises $141 million to continue building the future of creativity
entry.summary: We are thrilled to announce a $141M extension to our Series C with participation from Google, NVIDIA, Salesforce Ventures, and existing investors, among others.

entry.title: Scaling our in-house research infrastructure with AWS
entry.summary: A multi-year strategic research partnership with AWS to scale our applied AI research.

entry.title: Runway raises $50M Series C
entry.summary: Building the next creative suite, the Generative Suite.

entry.title: Runway raises $35M Series B
entry.summary: Doubling down on our mission to help more people tell stories with video.

entry.title: Runway raises $8.5M Series A
Building impossible things
entry.summary: A glimpse into the future of Runway.

entry.title: Machine Learning En Plein Air: Building accessible tools for artists
